creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Simply updating PORTVERSION in the Makefile is not enough to update 
the port - it is also necessary to submit updates for distinfo for 
the new MD5 checksum, verify that no patches need to be altered, 
deleted or added, and that the pkg-plist doesn't need any changes. 

In addition, you should ideally run submissions by the port maintainer 
first, and then indicate in the PR whether the maintainer approves or 
was unreachable.
